data.body: Correction: the 1.0.0 version was intentional, not accidental. The bug is that automatic version bumps (via bump-version.sh during merge-to-main.sh) have not been running since the 1.0.0 release. Multiple epics have merged without incrementing the version past 1.0.0. Expected: version should be ~1.3.0+ reflecting epics merged since 1.0.0.
